title: ruelingia patens
intro: Ruelingia patens, also known as Paterson's curse or rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruelingia patens include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Ruelingia patens may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
